Mumbai News LIVE Updates: Senior citizen loses Rs 1.56 crore in `Digital Arrest` scam, Thane police begins probe
A senior citizen was allegedly duped of Rs 1.56 crore in “digital arrest” scam and following a complaint the Thane police has launched a probe into the matter, reported the PTI. According to the police, the 64-year-old resident of Katrap in Badlapur area of Thane district in Maharashtra was duped by a gang of cyber fraudsters who placed him under digital arrest. Read More

Mumbai News LIVE Updates: First phase of launching the shaft completed
According to a statement issued by BMC, the first phase of the launching shaft at the Film City site has already been completed. The shaft measures around 200 metres in length, 50 metres in width and 30 metres in depth. Read more

Mumbai News LIVE Updates: Thane MACT orders Rs 38.7 lakh compensation to kin of father-son killed in road accident
The Thane Motor Accident Claims Tribunal (MACT) has awarded a compensation of Rs 38.74 lakh to the family of a father-son duo killed in a road accident in 2020, reported news agency PTI. Thane MACT member RV Mohite on Tuesday passed two separate orders of compensation for the death of the man and his son. Read More

Mumbai News LIVE Updates: The purpose of the Goregaon-Mulund Link Road is to connect Mumbai’s western and eastern suburbs
The 12.20-km Goregaon-Mulund Link Road aims to connect Mumbai’s western and eastern suburbs. As part of the project, twin underground tunnels will be constructed from Film City in Goregaon to Khindipada in Mulund. Each of the parallel tunnels will be about 4.70 km long and will feature three traffic lanes.
